message:
chore: add docs and legacy source files to crate include list

Add four files to the Cargo.toml include list so they are packaged with
the crate for crates.io publication:
- docs/extension-artifact-provenance.json
- docs/provider-upstream-model-ids-snapshot.json
- docs/schema/extension_protocol.json
- legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono/packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts

These files are referenced by the documentation and needed for
provenance verification and schema validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
